children.heading: Petition to district court by Attorney General on direction of President
children.label: a Petition to district court by Attorney General on direction of President
i
children.text: affects an entire industry or a substantial part thereof engaged in trade, commerce, transportation, transmission, or communication among the several States or with foreign nations, or engaged in the production of goods for commerce; and

children.label: ii
children.text: if permitted to occur or to continue, will imperil the national health or safety, it shall have jurisdiction to enjoin any such strike or lockout, or the continuing thereof, and to make such other orders as may be appropriate.

children.heading: Inapplicability of chapter 6
children.label: b Inapplicability of chapter 6
children.text: In any case, the provisions of chapter 6 of this title shall not be applicable.

children.heading: Review of orders
children.label: c Review of orders
children.text: The order or orders of the court shall be subject to review by the appropriate United States court of appeals and by the Supreme Court upon writ of certiorari or certification as provided in .section 1254 of title 28
